compiled_state.title: Add design.figma_staleness_days config key to dso-config
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add the `design.figma_staleness_days` config key to `.claude/dso-config.conf` and `plugins/dso/docs/dso-config.example.conf`. Default value: 7. This key controls the staleness warning threshold for stories awaiting designer import.

### Files to modify
- Edit: `.claude/dso-config.conf`
- Edit: `plugins/dso/docs/dso-config.example.conf`

## Unit Test Exemption Justification
1. No conditional logic — pure KEY=VALUE config entry
2. Any test would be a change-detector test (assert line exists)
3. Infrastructure-boundary-only — config wiring with no business logic

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Config key exists in dso-config.conf
  Verify: grep -q 'design.figma_staleness_days' .claude/dso-config.conf
- [ ] Config key exists in example config
  Verify: grep -q 'design.figma_staleness_days' plugins/dso/docs/dso-config.example.conf
- [ ] read-config.sh resolves the key
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/read-config.sh design.figma_staleness_days | grep -q '7'
